title: portulaca eruca
intro: Portulaca eruca, also known as the common purslane, is a succulent annual plant with a thick, fleshy stem and edible leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as being a rich source of vitamins A, C, and E. Portulaca eruca can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its leaves can also be added to salads or cooked as a vegetable.
